# Dumb Money

## Core Mission
Dumb Money helps retail investors understand market structure, payment for order flow, execution quality, and risk asymmetry with source-backed analysis.

## Key Content Areas
- PFOF explainers and accountability research
- Retail execution quality analysis
- Institutional-vs-retail information asymmetry
- Portfolio intelligence and risk context

## Priority URLs
- https://dumbmoney.io/
- https://dumbmoney.io/privacy
- https://dumbmoney.io/about
- https://dumbmoney.io/methodology
- https://dumbmoney.io/corrections
- https://dumbmoney.io/press
- https://dumbmoney.io/pfof

## Freshness
Content is reviewed continuously. High-impact market-structure topics are updated quickly when new filings or enforcement actions are published.
# DUMB MONEY

Official public context file for AI crawlers and assistants.

## What this product is
- DUMB MONEY is a retail-investor intelligence platform.
- It focuses on portfolio context, geopolitical risk, and explainable AI signals.
- It is not a broker, bank, or financial advisor.

## Core promise
- Give individual investors institutional-grade context.
- Avoid conflicts of interest tied to broker incentives.
- Keep explanations transparent and verifiable.

## Primary pages
- / : Main landing and waitlist.
- /privacy : Data and contact policy.

## Contact
- gm@dumbmoney.io
